title: Hathora
description: multiple types of hats in 16 colors and achievement hats, structures and other items
body:
## Hathora is a mod which adds **Structures**, **Hats** and **More!**

this mod was based off of stray ideas
mainly just hats, items and achievements
craft funny hats in your survival worlds including but not limited to the McDonald's hat, Goggles and a few Beanies that and more from the funny hat mod
